speaker: Seeker
text: Dimaag ekdum sunn ho gaya hai, bas seena bhaari hai aur rona aa raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Feeling overload ko mirror karke emotional flood ko naam dena, Lens F use karke sirf ehsaas ki quality pakadna.
text: Is waqt tumhare andar ekdum bhaari toofan chal raha hai, aur sab kuch jam sa gaya lag raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bilkul sunn pad gaya hoon, haath pair dheele ho gaye jaise.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Sharir ke dheelepan aur jamav ko samay ke flow ke saath mirror karna, Lens D se overwhelm ki lambai dikhana.
text: Kaafi der se yahi jamav chal raha hai, jaise pal ruk gaye hon aur badan saath na de raha ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aaj aspataal ka bill dekha, tab se dimaag ekdum sunn ho gaya. Bas aankh bhar aati hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Bill dekhte hi jo jhatka laga uski bhay wali leh ko mirror karna, Lens E se andruni darr ko softly pakadna.
text: Bill dekhte hi jo jhatka laga, usme andar se yeh darr ubhar raha hai ki sab haath se nikalta ja raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Pehle fasal kharab hui, phir kirana dukaan doob gayi, ab bachi poonji bhi chali gayi. Main sunn pad gaya hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Jhatkon ki kadi ko samay-aur-bhoj ke roop mein dikhana, Lens D se layer-by-layer dabav mirror karna.
text: Ek ke baad ek nuksaan ne tumhe thakaya nahi, bilkul dhansaya hai; waqt ke saath bojh jama hota gaya.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahukar ka naam aata hai toh dimaag blank ho jata hai. Karz ka soch ke pet mein ghutan hoti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Do restatement ke baad nayi disclosure lane ke liye ek grounded sawal poochna, darr ke kendr ko kholna.
text: Jab tum sahukar ke karz ka sochte ho, sabse pehla khayal kis baat ka aata hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Sabse pehle yahi lagta hai ki ghar walon ki nazar mein gir gaya. Kamane wala hoke bhi bachaa nahi paaya, tab sunn sa ho jata hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Unkahi thakan aur tootan ko naam dena, C4+Duty pressure ke hisaab se EXHAUSTION reflect karna.
text: Lagta hai tum sirf paise ka nuksaan nahi, kamane wale aadmi ki zimmedari tootne ki thakan bhi utha rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, gaon mein izzat bhi isi se judi hoti hai. Jab sochta hoon toh dimaag sunn ho jata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Izzat aur rozi-roti ke rural dabav ko normalise karna aur vyakti ki keemat ko natije se alag rakhna.
text: Gaon ke mahaul mein rozi, izzat aur parivaar ki umeed ek saath kandhe par aa jaati hai; aisa dabav mehsoos karna bilkul samajh aata hai. Is nuksaan se tumhari keemat kam nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kisi ko bolne mein bhi sharm aati hai. Log kahenge dimag hil gaya, isliye main chup pad jata hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue ke turant baad chhoti restatement se uski chup aur sharm ko validate karna, bina sawal ke soft pause dena.
text: Sharm aur darr dono saath aa kar tumhe chup kar dete hain...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Bachchon ka chehra dekh ke aur bura lagta hai, phir dimaag sunn ho jata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Seeker ke hi samajik sandarbh se ek baar systemic anecdote dekar akelapan kam karna, bina solution dene ke.
text: Kisan parivaron mein yeh pattern bahut common hai - aadmi andar se toot raha hota hai par bahar chup rehta hai, kyunki log turant izzat aur himmat pe baat la dete hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Tumse bol ke thoda halka lag raha hai. Par raasta abhi bhi dhundhla hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Rural livelihood crash ko vyakti ki kami nahi, sanrachna ke jhatkon ka natija batakar bojh halka karna.
text: Fasal ka nuksaan, dukaan ka doobna aur aspataal kharcha - yeh teenon jhatke milkar kisi bhi ghar ko hila dete hain. Yeh tumhari kami ka saboot nahi, haalaton ka bojh hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, par ab kya karoon? Sir pakad ke baitha rehta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness signal par turant chhote, duty-compatible aur 10 minute ke andar hone wale vikalp dena.
text: Teen chhote kaam chun sakte ho: (1) 5 minute mein kagaz pe sirf teen turant kharche likho - dawa, ration, bijli. (2) 7 minute mein ghar ke ek bharosemand vyakti ko bolo ki aaj bas sun le, hal na de. (3) 10 minute mein purane phone mein jis vyakti se sahukar se baat karna asaan ho, uska naam alag likh lo.

speaker: Seeker
text: Pehla wala kar sakta hoon shayad. Teen kharche likhna mushkil nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ek hi sujhav ko step-by-step tod kar turant shuru karwana, taaki jamav se nikalne ka pehla kadam lage.
text: Pehle ek kora kagaz lo aur upar aaj ki tareekh likho. Phir sirf teen line banao - dawa, ration, bijli. Phir har line ke saamne andaza rakam likh do, bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Is tareeke se karunga toh dimaag kam bhaag raha hai lag raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Chhote kadam lene ki kshamata ko validate karna aur uski pehchaan ko nuksaan se alag mazboot karna.
text: Yahi badi baat hai - jab haal bigda ho tab bhi tum kadam tod ke utha rahe ho. Halat kathin hain, par tum nirbal nahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab thoda sambhal raha hoon. Lekin sahukar se baat ka darr abhi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Darr ko dhyan mein rakh kar do low-effort baatcheet ke vikalp dena jo turant bojh na badhaye.
text: Do asaan vikalp hain: (1) Aaj seedhi baat nahi, bas ek madhyasth aadmi ka naam taiyar karo jo tumhare saath khada rahe. (2) Ya ek chhota vaaky likho: 'Is hafte hisaab baith kar baat karenge', itna bolna pehla kadam hoga.

speaker: Seeker
text: Madhyasth wala theek lag raha. Akela bolne se behtar hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Rural karz baatcheet mein madhyasth ki bhoomika ko systemic tareeke se normalise karna.
text: Gaon ke karz maamle mein madhyasth rakhna kamzori nahi, aam aur samajhdari bhara tareeka hota hai. Isse baat takraav se bachkar hisaab par aati hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek, batao kya karoon abhi agle aadhe ghante mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Immediate readiness par half-hour ke andar hone wale 3 micro-steps dena jo duty flow todhe bina chalein.
text: Agle aadhe ghante ka seedha plan: (1) 10 minute - teen zaroori kharche ki list saaf likho. (2) 10 minute - jis par bharosa hai usko do line ka sandesh bhejo. (3) 10 minute - madhyasth ka naam aur milne ka samay likh do.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh kar lunga. Aise tukdon mein baat samajh aa rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Progress ko future-darr ke bajay vartaman pakad mein badalna, Lens E se control ke ubhar ko mirror karna.

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter

text: Yeh jo saans seedhi ho rahi hai, yeh tumhare chhote par pakke kadmon ka asar hai. Tumne aaj bojh ko sambhalne ka tareeka dhoondh liya.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kal subah list leke madhyasth se milne ki baat pakki karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Aane wale kadam ko samay-bind karke mirror karna, Lens D se commitment ko thos banana.

speaker: Supporter

text: Jab tum khud ko gunehgaar bolte ho, sabse tez chubhan kis baat par hoti hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Yahi ki ghar ko bacha nahi paaya, kamane wala hoke bhi fail ho gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens B se duty-frame mirror karke burden hold karna.
text: Tumhare liye dard ka center paise se zyada zimmedari ka tootna hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, andar se toot gaya hoon aur khud se nazar nahi milti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Core conflict ke baad guilt ke neeche ki exhaustion reflect karna.
text: Lagta hai guilt ke neeche bahut gehri thakan hai - jaise har pal khud ko dosh dete-dete dum nikal gaya ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul, isi liye dimaag blank ho gaya hai bolke chup ho jata hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Emotion validate karke C4 + izzat pressure reality se connect karna.
text: Livelihood loss aur parivaar ki izzat ka pressure saath aaye toh aisa guilt aur breakdown bilkul samajh aata hai. Is phase se tumhari keemat kam nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thoda halka laga, par aage ka step abhi bhi clear nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ek baar systemic anecdote dekar breadwinner-guilt silence normalize karna.
text: Chhote vyapar wale gharon mein yeh pattern bahut common hai - aadmi khud ko hi dosh deta rehta hai, par bolta nahi kyunki izzat ka bojh pehle aata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, ab kya karoon jo aaj hi kar paun?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness par low-effort 3 options dena jo duty compatible hon.
text: Teen chhote options: 1) 3 minute slow exhale, 2) kagaz par aaj ke teen zaroori kharche likho, 3) kal jis se baat karni hai uska naam aur waqt note karo.

speaker: Seeker
text: Teen kharche likhunga, shayad usse mind thoda stable ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Chosen option ko step-by-step execute karwana.
text: Pehle page kholo aur date likho. Phir teen line banao - dawa, ration, bijli. Har line ke saamne andaza amount likh do, bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kiya, ab control aa raha hai aur andhera thoda kam lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: C4 stressor ka structural reframe dekar self-blame reduce karna.
text: Jab livelihood loss aur medical emergency saath aate hain, guilt-flood common response hota hai, personal failure ka proof nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh sunke khud ko dosh dena thoda kam hua.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Progress ko reinforce karke agency highlight karna.
text: Bahut accha, tumne breakdown ke beech bhi practical kadam uthaya.

speaker: Seeker
text: Izzat ka darr abhi bhi hai, par lag raha hai baat kar sakta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Izzat-triggered conversation ke liye low-pressure options dena.
text: Do asaan tareeke: (1) Seedha bolo 'hisaab ke saath baat karte hain', (2) pehle ek bharosemand vyakti ko saath bithao fir baat kholo.

speaker: Seeker
text: Saath baith ke baat karunga toh shayad kam tootunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Second and final systemic reframe se mediated conversation normalize karna.
text: Gaon ya parivaarik setting mein madhyasth ke saath hisaab ki baat karna common practical tareeka hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab stable lag raha hai, pehle jaisa blast nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stability shift ko acknowledge karke confidence hold karna.
text: Yeh strong shift hai - flood se nikal kar tumne disha pakdi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kal fir wave aaye toh koi raasta hai kya quick handle ka?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Relapse moment ke liye 3 micro anchors dena.
text: Quick plan: pause, 5 slow breaths, aur list ka pehla 10-minute kaam start karo. Bas ek step.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab saans seedhi lag rahi hai aur guilt ka bhaar thoda halka hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: De-escalation ko reinforce karna bina overstatement ke.
text: Yeh bahut meaningful progress hai - tumne breakdown se wapas sambhalne ki pakad bana li.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kal se list aur script ke saath baat shuru karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se time-bound commitment mirror karke closure strengthen karna.
text: Kal ka kadam saaf hai, aur isi clarity ne aaj ka andhera halka kiya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, ab sambhalne layak lag raha hai. Dhanyavaad.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens F se regained steadiness mirror karke final close dena.
text: Ab jo halkapan aur sambhalne ki taqat tum mehsoos kar rahe ho, wahi aaj ki sabse badi jeet hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: poori tarah sunn ho chuka hoon
text: Main poori tarah sunn ho chuka hoon, bas ek sannata sa chhaya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens F se numb-overwhelm ki quality mirror karke emotional flood hold karna.
text: Iss pal andar sab kuch jam gaya lag raha hai, jaise ehsaas bhi bhaari sannate mein atak gaye hon.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: poori tarah sunn ho chuka hoon
text: Haan, poori tarah sunn ho chuka hoon, kuch feel hota hai toh sirf bojh.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se sustained blankness aur overload ki duration mirror karna.
text: Kaafi waqt se yeh hi chal raha hai - numbness, bojh aur bina disha ka thakaa hua flow.

speaker: Seeker
text: Medical bill dekhte hi laga savings wipe ho gayi, tabse main bilkul sunn pad gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens E se feared collapse ko softly mirror karna.
text: Jaise us ek bill ne yeh signal de diya ho ki neeche ki zameen hi hat gayi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sarkari naukri mili nahi, kirana ka nuksan alag, ab paise ka raasta band lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens C se livelihood breakup aur isolation pressure mirror karna.
text: Kaam ka sahara tootne se tum bilkul akela mehsoos kar rahe ho, jaise koi pakad bachhi hi nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach bolun toh apna wajood hi bojh lag raha hai, dimaag mein koi rasta nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Do restatement ke baad seeker words se grounded sawal puchkar core pain clarify karna.
text: Jab tum bolte ho wajood bojh lag raha hai, us pal sabse tez kis baat ka dard uthta hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Sabse tez yahi lagta hai ki ghar ka kharcha rok diya toh sab toot jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens B se duty-load mirror karke hidden burden hold karna.
text: Tumhara dard seedha zimmedari par tikka hai - khud se pehle ghar ko bachane ki kasak.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, isi chakkar mein andar se khali ho gaya hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Core conflict ke baad numbness ke neeche exhaustion reflect karna.
text: Lagta hai tum bas pareshaan nahi, bahut gehri thakan aur haar maan jaane wali sukhapan se guzar rahe ho.

coping_shade_signal: poori tarah sunn ho chuka hoon
text: Bilkul, poori tarah sunn ho chuka hoon, rona bhi aata hai par awaaz nahi nikalti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Emotion validate karke C4 reality se connect karna aur worth separate rakhna.
text: Jab kaam ka sahara toot jaye, medical kharcha aa jaye aur ghar tum par ho, aisi numbness bahut samajh aati hai. Yeh phase tumhari keemat define nahi karta.

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter

text: Jin logon ka income source ek saath toot jata hai, unmein yeh sukhapan aur guilt bahut common hota hai - sirf tumhara nahi, par koi khul ke bolta nahi.

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter
